descriptions.gluten: Konke ukudla okusanhlamvu noma ufulawa (ukolweni, ibhali, rye, isipelingi): isinkwa, i-pasta, i-pizza, amakhekhe, amakhukhi, ubhiya
descriptions.eggs: Amaqanda, ama-omelettes, amaqebelengwane, imayonnaise, i-pasta entsha
descriptions.peanuts: Amantongomane, ibhotela lamantongomane, ukudla okulula, ama-dessert
descriptions.soy: Tofu, soy sauce, soy milk, edamame
descriptions.celery: Isilimo esidliwayo esinamagatsha anamanzi, amasaladi, amasobho, imihluzi yemifino
descriptions.sesame: Imbewu yeSesame, i-sesame oil, i-hummus, isinkwa
descriptions.lupin: Ufulawa we-lupine, isinkwa, i-pasta, ukudla okulula
descriptions.fava_beans: Ubhontshisi be-fava, isobho likabhontshisi we-fava, i-fava bean puree, isitshulu

warnings.gluten: ⚠️ Isexwayiso: isoso yesoya ingase ibe ne-gluten
warnings.fava_beans: Ukushoda kwe-G6PD: ngisho amanani amancane angabangela inkinga ye-hemolytic

cardTexts.subtitle: UKWALIWA KOKUDLA
cardTexts.message: Nginokungezwani nokudla okulandelayo. Sicela uqinisekise ukuthi ukudla kwami ​​akuqukethe lezi zithako, okuhlanganisa nokungcoliswa okuphambene.
cardTexts.pregnancyMessage: Ngikhulelwe futhi nginokungezwani nokudla okulandelayo. Sicela uqinisekise ukuthi ukudla kwami ​​akuqukethe lezi zithako, okuhlanganisa nokungcoliswa okuphambene.
cardTexts.thanks: Ngiyabonga kakhulu ngokuqonda kwakho nosizo lwakho.

restrictions.diabetes_sweet_sauces: Amasoso amnandi (ketchup, amnandi futhi amuncu, teriyaki)

restrictionCardTexts.message: Ngenxa yezizathu zempilo, ngidinga ukugwema ukudla okulandelayo:

pregnancy.message: Ngikhulelwe. Sicela uqinisekise ukuthi ukudla kwami ​​akuqukethe okulandelayo:
pregnancy.sectionMessage: Ukwengeza, ngenxa yokukhulelwa kwami, kufanele futhi ngigweme:

no_meat.message:
Angiyidli inyama. 
Izinhlanzi neminye imikhiqizo yezilwane kulungile.
no_meat.sectionMessage:
Ukwengeza, angiyidli inyama. 
Izinhlanzi neminye imikhiqizo yezilwane kulungile.

no_meat_fish.message:
Ngilandela ukudla kwemifino. 
Angiyidli inyama nenhlanzi.
no_meat_fish.sectionMessage: Ukwengeza, ngilandela ukudla kwemifino futhi angiyidli inyama noma inhlanzi.

no_animal_products.message:
Ngilandela ukudla kwe-vegan. 
Angiyidli inyama, inhlanzi, ukudla kwasolwandle, amaqanda, ubisi, uju nanoma yimiphi imikhiqizo yezilwane.
no_animal_products.sectionMessage: Ukwengeza, ngilandela ukudla kwe-vegan futhi angidli inyama, inhlanzi, ukudla kwasolwandle, amaqanda, ubisi, uju nanoma yimiphi imikhiqizo yezilwane.

nickel.message: Nginokungezwani ne-nickel. I-nickel iyinsimbi etholakala ekudleni okuningi. Sicela uqinisekise ukuthi ukudla kwami ​​akuqukethe:
nickel.sectionMessage: Ukwengeza, nginokungezwani ne-nickel. I-nickel iyinsimbi etholakala ekudleni okuningi. Sicela uqinisekise ukuthi ukudla kwami ​​akuqukethe:

histamine.message: Angikwazi ukudla ukudla okunothe nge-histamine. I-Histamine itholakala ekudleni osekukhulile, okubilile noma okugcinwe isikhathi eside. Ngokwesibonelo:
histamine.sectionMessage: Ukwengeza, angikwazi ukudla ukudla okunothe nge-histamine. I-Histamine itholakala ekudleni osekukhulile, okubilile noma okugcinwe isikhathi eside. Ngokwesibonelo:

diabetes.message: Nginesifo sikashukela futhi ngidinga ukulawula indlela engidla ngayo ushukela. Ngicela ungangifaki ushukela ekudleni kwami ​​futhi ungazise uma uqukethe:
diabetes.sectionMessage: Ukwengeza, nginesifo sikashukela futhi ngidinga ukulawula izinga lami likashukela. Ngicela ungafaki ushukela ekudleni kwami ​​futhi ungazise uma uqukethe:
